title.tagline: Layer colors and move closer to white.
title.trust: Trust the colors, not the numbers.

classic.label: Classic
classic.description: The round ends as soon as any color channel bursts.

clampChallenge.label: Clamp Challenge
clampChallenge.description: Continue after one color bursts; the next new burst ends the round. Initial colors and cards tend to be brighter, and bursting lowers the score ceiling.

custom.description: Play with this rule's custom settings.

game.statusAnnouncement: Check the current and next colors. Round {{round}}, {{cards}} cards remaining.
game.continuedBurst: {{count}} color burst · continuing at the limit
